xbrli:xbrl.in-bse-fin:DisclosureOfNotesOnFinancialR:
Notes to Financial Results:
1.The following ratios which form part of the Standalone Financial Results for the quarter and nine months ended 31st December, 2024, are reproduced below, as there are no rows designated for the same in the XBRL format:

Ratio Quarter ended Nine Months ended
31st December, 2024 31st December, 2024

A) Current ratio 1.01 1.01
B) Long Term Debt to Working Capital 6.25 6.25
C) Bad Debts to Account Receivable Ratio 0.00 0.00
D) Current Liability Ratio 0.56 0.56
E) Total Debt to Total Assets 0.22 0.22
F) Debtors Turnover Ratio $ 39.92 39.55
G) Inventory Turnover Ratio $ 6.26 6.82
H) Operating Margin (%) 8.0 7.1
I) Net Profit Margin (%) 6.5 5.8

$ Ratios for the quarter / nine months have been annualised.

2. Net Worth as at 31st December, 2024 is Rs. 485,669 Crore.

3. Outstanding Capital Redemption Reserve/Debenture Redemption Reserve as at at 31st December, 2024 is Rs.1,683 Crore.

4. . Formulae for computation of ratios are as follows :

i. Debt Service Coverage Ratio = Earnings before Interest and Tax
------------------------------------------------------------------------
Interest Expense + Principal Repayments made during
the period for long term loans

ii. Interest Service Coverage Ratio = Earnings before Interest and Tax
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
Interest Expense

iii. Debt/ Equity Ratio = Total Debt
------------------
Total Equity


iv. Current ratio = Current Assets
---------------------
Current Liabilities

v. Long term debt to working capital = Non-Current Borrowings (Including Current Maturities of
Non-Current Borrowings)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
Current Assets Less Current Liabilities (Excluding Current
Maturities of Non-Current Borrowings)

vi. Bad debts to Account receivable = Bad Debts
ratio ------------------
Average Trade Receivables


vii. Current liability ratio = Total Current Liabilities
------------------------------------------------------------------------
Total Liabilities

viii. Total debts to total assets = Total Debt
-----------------
Total Assets

ix. Debtors turnover = Value of Sales & Services
----------------------------------
Average Trade Receivables

x. Inventory turnover = Cost of Goods Sold (Cost of Material Consumed+ Purchases +
Changes in Inventory + Manufacturing Expenses)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Average Inventories of Finished Goods, Stock-in-Process and
Stock-in-Trade


xi. Operating margin (%) = Earnings before Interest and Tax
less Other Income
----------------------------------
Value of Sales & Services


xii. Net profit margin (%) = Profit After Tax
-------------------------------------------------------
Value of Sales & Services


5. During the quarter, a) 142,565 partly paid-up equity shares were cancelled post forfeiture; and b) 676,61,86,449 equity shares were allotted to the eligible holders of equity shares on the record date (i.e., October 28, 2024) as bonus equity shares by capitalizing securities premium. In accordance with the ‘Ind AS 33 – Earnings per Share’, the figures of Earnings Per Share for the quarter ended September 30, 2024 and year ended March 31, 2024 and quarter/nine months ended December 31, 2023 have been restated to give effect to the allotment of the bonus shares.
xbrli:xbrl.in-bse-fin:DisclosureOfNotesOnSegmentsEx:
1. Q3 FY25 Segment Revenue includes Rs 5,873 crore GST recovered. Net Revenue is Rs 128,260 crore.

2. 9M FY25 Segment Revenue includes Rs 17,838 crore GST recovered. Net Revenue is Rs 396,645 crore.

3. Oil to Chemicals Segment results includes Interest Income pertaining to it's segment.
xbrli:xbrl.in-bse-fin:DescriptionOfItemThatWillNotB: Amount of items that will not be reclassified to profit and loss
Amount of items that will not be reclassified to profit and loss
xbrli:xbrl.in-bse-fin:DescriptionOfItemThatWillBeRe: Amount of items that will be reclassified to profit and loss
Amount of items that will be reclassified to profit and loss
